definition: deltaS(x,T) = S(x,T) - S_peak(T)*CDF(P_T)(x); x=(I-I_peak)/w. Ridge half-window x_ridge from canonical Phi1 first sign-change on +x: x_ridge=0.122457. Observable: O1(T)=∫_{-x_ridge}^{x_ridge} deltaS(x,T) dx.
robustness_summary: x_ridge scaled by 0.8..1.2 => Pearson=[1,1], Spearman=[1,1], LOOCV_RMSE=[2.09128e-17,4.63748e-17] (idealized Phi1-rank1 residual evaluation)

definition: deltaS(x,T)=S(x,T)-S_peak(T)*CDF(P_T)(x); x as above. Use same x_ridge. Observable: O2(T)=∫_{x_min..x_max, |x|>x_ridge} deltaS(x,T) dx (i.e., total integral minus ridge integral on the canonical x-grid).
robustness_summary: x_ridge scaled by 0.8..1.2 => Pearson=[-1,-1], Spearman=[-1,-1], LOOCV_RMSE=[2.46957e-17,3.86860e-17] (idealized Phi1-rank1 residual evaluation)

definition: Use same deltaS and x_ridge. Observable: O3(T)=∫_{-x_ridge}^{x_ridge} x^2 * deltaS(x,T) dx.
robustness_summary: x_ridge scaled by 0.8..1.2 => Pearson=[1,1], Spearman=[1,1], LOOCV_RMSE=[2.15739e-17,3.35180e-17] (idealized Phi1-rank1 residual evaluation)

definition: Use same deltaS and x_ridge; let x_min=-x_max from the canonical x-grid. Define ridge mean m_r(T)=O1(T)/(2*x_ridge) and shoulder mean m_s(T)=O2(T)/( (x_max-x_min) - 2*x_ridge ). Observable: O4(T)=m_r(T)-m_s(T).
robustness_summary: x_ridge scaled by 0.8..1.2 => Pearson=[1,1], Spearman=[1,1], LOOCV_RMSE=[1.88971e-17,3.39935e-17] (idealized Phi1-rank1 residual evaluation)

definition: Use deltaS(x,T) and x from the canonical grid. Choose sigma from ridge width: sigma = x_ridge/2 with the same x_ridge above. Observable: O5(T)=∫_{x_min..x_max} deltaS(x,T)*exp(-x^2/(2*sigma^2)) dx.
robustness_summary: x_ridge scaled by 0.8..1.2 => Pearson=[1,1], Spearman=[1,1], LOOCV_RMSE=[3.00463e-17,4.92287e-17] (idealized Phi1-rank1 residual evaluation)
